---
page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-screen .hero-section}
<canvas id="spinfoamCanvas"></canvas>

::: {.hero-content}
<p class="hero-subtitle">PhD Candidate in Theoretical Physics</p>
<h2 class="hero-title">Covariant loop quantum gravity,<br> 
<span class="highlight">spinfoam cosmology</span>,<br>
 and phenomenology of
<span class="highlight">primordial black holes</span>.</h2>

<div class="hero-links">
  <a href="https://arxiv.org/search/gr-qc?searchtype=author&query=Dierckx,+A" target="_blank">
    <i class="ai ai-arxiv" style="color: #d3a3ff;"></i> arXiv
  </a>
  <span class="separator">|</span>
  <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0001-8717-1712" target="_blank">
    <i class="ai ai-orcid" style="color: #d3a3ff;"></i> ORCiD
  </a>
  <span class="separator">|</span>
  <a href="https://inspirehep.net/authors/3157664" target="_blank">
    <i class="ai ai-inspire" style="color: #d3a3ff;"></i> iNSPIRE HEP
  </a>
</div>

:::

<script defer src="assets/js/spinfoam.js"></script>
:::

::: {.column-page}

## Recent Releases

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.release-card}
<div class="release-badge paper-badge">New Paper</div>
### Signatures of LQG in PBH cosmologies
*In collaboration with F. Vidotto & S. Clesse.* 

Exploring the phenomenological signatures of Loop Quantum Gravity in the context of Primordial Black Hole cosmologies.

<br>
<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28953" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm release-btn">
  <i class="ai ai-arxiv"></i> Read on arXiv ➔
</a>
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.release-card}
<div class="release-badge code-badge">New Code</div>
### Framework `pbh-rem`
*Developed in Mathematica.*

Computational framework to evaluate phenomenological constraints on Primordial Black Holes with stable remnants (Planckian relics and Memory Burden effects).

<br>
<a href="./posts/pbh-rem.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-info btn-sm release-btn">
  Read the blog post ➔
</a>
:::
:::

:::

---

## Research Focus

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Primordial Black Holes & Remnants
Studying the phenomenological consequences of stabilization mechanisms in **PBH** evaporation, focusing on **Planckian relics** within Loop Quantum Gravity and macroscopic remnants induced by the **Memory Burden effect**.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Spinfoam Numerics & Cosmology
Developing numerical and computational tools to evaluate spin foam amplitudes, with a specific application to structural transitions in **spinfoam cosmology**.
:::

:::

---

## Navigation

### Academic Research
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
[Research Themes](./research/themes.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-teal .w-100}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
[Publications](./research/papers.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-indigo .w-100}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
[Talks & Slides](./research/talks.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-purple .w-100}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
[Early Research](./research/early-research.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-blue .w-100}
:::
:::

### Teaching & Notes
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
[Bachelor Notes](./notes/bachelor.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-emerald .w-100}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
[Master Notes](./notes/master.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-teal .w-100}
:::
:::

### Engagement & Projects
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
[Outreach & Projects](./outreach/projects.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-rose .w-100}
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
[Blog](./blog.qmd){.btn .btn-surface .c-indigo .w-100}
:::
:::

:::
